documents.title: 278-T Periodic Transaction Report
documents.summary: Periodic transaction report (Form 278-T) disclosing individual securities transactions over $1,000 during the reporting window. See PDF for itemized transaction list.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification (Amended Ethics Agreement Enclosure)
documents.summary: OGE-form certification. Marks Yes/No/N/A on standard sections (resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction reports filed, recusals, ethics briefing). Multiple iterations on file as ethics agreement was amended.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification (with July 15 ethics agreement amendment)
documents.summary: OGE-form certification. Marks Yes/No/N/A on standard sections (resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction reports filed, recusals, ethics briefing). Multiple iterations on file as ethics agreement was amended.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement Compliance Certification
documents.summary: OGE-form certification. Marks Yes/No/N/A on standard sections (resignations, divestitures, periodic transaction reports filed, recusals, ethics briefing). Multiple iterations on file as ethics agreement was amended.

documents.title: Ethics Agreement (Amended 12/08/2025)
documents.summary: Original Ethics Agreement signed Jan 9, 2025; subsequently amended at least four times (May 2, June 5, July 15, and Dec 5, 2025). The July 15 amendment retains three holdings Bessent originally agreed to divest (Presight RV Co-Invest Fund LP, Half Acre WSW LLC, Cambrian Biopharma) because no liquid buyer could be identified. The Dec 5 amendment extends the divestiture deadline for High Plains Acres LLP, Greengage Global Holdings, and Aperion (DE) Feeder Fund to Dec 15, 2025 due to illiquid nature.

documents.title: Nominee 278 (Amended 05/05/2025)
documents.summary: Public financial disclosure filed Dec 28, 2024 before Senate confirmation as Treasury Secretary. Lists assets, income sources, liabilities and outside positions held at time of nomination. See PDF for itemized holdings.

propublicaCheck.discrepancies: ProPublica surfaces 2 main document types: the amended Form 278e and Form 278-T transaction reports spanning Feb–Dec 2025. Open Cabinet documents 8 OGE records including 4 distinct compliance certification filings (7/16, 7/26, 11/14, 12/08) which ProPublica does not enumerate separately. Both data sources reflect Bessent's repeated ethics agreement amendments addressing illiquid holdings.
